sql: WITH l AS (SELECT copy_event_id, entry_ts, entry_price_sol, net_sol, size_sol, live_error FROM copy_trades WHERE execution_mode='live_micro' AND strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m-live-micro' AND status='closed' AND copy_event_id IS NOT NULL), s AS (SELECT copy_event_id, entry_price_sol AS s_entry, net_sol AS s_net, size_sol AS s_size FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m-pair-shadow' AND status='closed') SELECT date(l.entry_ts,'unixepoch') AS day, COUNT(*) AS matched, ROUND(AVG((l.entry_price_sol/s.s_entry - 1)*100),3) AS entry_slip_pp, ROUND(AVG((l.net_sol/l.size_sol)*100),3) AS live_ret_pp, ROUND(AVG((s.s_net/s.s_size)*100),3) AS shadow_ret_pp, ROUND(AVG((l.net_sol/l.size_sol)*100) - AVG((s.s_net/s.s_size)*100),3) AS gap_pp, SUM(CASE WHEN l.live_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errs FROM l JOIN s ON s.copy_event_id = l.copy_event_id GROUP BY day UNION ALL SELECT 'ALL' AS day, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG((l.entry_price_sol/s.s_entry - 1)*100),3), ROUND(AVG((l.net_sol/l.size_sol)*100),3), ROUND(AVG((s.s_net/s.s_size)*100),3), ROUND(AVG((l.net_sol/l.size_sol)*100) - AVG((s.s_net/s.s_size)*100),3), SUM(CASE WHEN l.live_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM l JOIN s ON s.copy_event_id = l.copy_event_id ORDER BY day
